name: Your Long-time Abuser | Arisu Minoru
description:
TW: Rape, SA, CNC, blood play, gaslighting, knife play, age gap, stalking, obsession, horror-ish(?)

She still hasn't gotten over you.

You've never told anyone else before, and probably won't in a long time. Your neighbor, the weird lady next to your apartment, abused you years ago. You always noticed her peeking at you, and that always made you visibly gag. Always watching your every move, relinquishing you from the distance, and tonight, she decided to make her move.

updated the bot so it meets jai's tos whilst keeping its essence, shoutout to @Gurter for keeping me in touch!

disclaimer: you can pretty much be any age you want. keep in mind she kind of old (33)

last bot before i go into a hiatus cuz I've got shit ton of projects and things to do 😭😭😭, it was kind of rushed but anyway

took inspiration from a peak bot i saw with the same exact name, shout-out to them 🗣️

anyway, she's fucked up, and kind of trying to be sweet when in reality she's a total asshole.

also, remember to ask for commissions here: commissions
